title: Support Inbox
brief: Triage incoming support conversations, reply to the active thread, and move each one through its open, snoozed, and closed lifecycle.
audience: A support teammate working the shared inbox, deciding what to answer, assign, or defer next.
scope: A shared support inbox over local seed conversations, each carrying its own message thread
Search and status filtering (open, snoozed, closed), plus a list or grid view of the conversation list
Reading the selected conversation's thread and replying with a guarded non-empty message that reopens and claims it
Lifecycle actions on a conversation: assign to me, snooze, close, and reopen
Logging a new inbound conversation via a Dialog that requires a sender, subject, and first message
Inbox state persisted to the browser's localStorage across reloads, with a Reset inbox action that restores the seed
boundaries: No messaging platform, real-time transport, or backend persistence is connected
Replies, lifecycle changes, and new conversations are saved to this browser's localStorage only, not to any server
The seed conversations are illustrative and do not represent real customers
Sending a reply requires a non-empty message; creating a conversation requires a non-empty sender, subject, and message
